CustomField.description: Number of days left until the cluster capacity reaches 90%
CustomField.formula: IF( NOT(ISNULL(Tentative_Date_for_90_Capacity__c)), IF( Tentative_Date_for_90_Capacity__c >= TODAY(), Tentative_Date_for_90_Capacity__c - TODAY(), 0 ), null )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of days left until the cluster capacity reaches 90%
CustomField.label: Capacity Days Until 90%
